claim_survival_audit.reason: Only two outcome counts; state in text or claim-to-evidence table.

method_no_harm_profile.reason: Sparse no-harm/false-context points; full-benchmark metric profile and no-harm table carry the evidence more cleanly.

modal_matrix_execution.reason: Administrative job counts are better as a reproducibility table.

registered_no_harm_dumbbell.reason: Mostly zero-valued false-context rates; report as a no-harm audit row.

synthetic_no_harm_dumbbell.reason: Mostly zero-valued false-context rates; report as a no-harm audit row.

threshold_leave_one_out_checks.reason: Four count values; a robustness table is clearer than a bar chart.

utility_delta_vs_always_context.reason: The key contrast is already covered by regret/metric-profile figures; use a sentence or supplementary method-delta table.
